IN-DE.notes: India-Germany DTAA 2011. Prevents double taxation on salary income. Social security agreement in place.

IN-SG.notes: India-Singapore DTAA 1994. No social security agreement. Shadow payroll required to track home-country obligations.

IN-UAE.notes: India-UAE DTAA 1992. UAE has no income tax so treaty mainly governs investment income. Salary is effectively tax-free in UAE.
